claim: manual.depends_on[*].packet_id is already parsed into CausalLinks.blocks[] via packetReferencesToCausalLinks() and promoted to ENABLED (reverse) edges through causal-links-processor.ts CAUSAL_LINK_MAPPINGS
manual.supersedes[*].packet_id and manual.related_to[*].packet_id follow the same packetReferencesToCausalLinks() path and are promoted to SUPERSEDES and SUPPORTS edges respectively

parent_id in graph-metadata.json (high determinism, structurally authoritative) is NOT currently promoted to any causal edge — it is read for resume routing only; Phase 005 must add a child→DERIVED_FROM→parent edge promoter

children_ids[] in graph-metadata.json (high determinism) are not promoted to causal edges; inversion of parent_id could be inferred at graph-traversal time to avoid double-insertion but explicit promotion adds discoverability
cite: lib/graph/graph-metadata-schema.ts:66 + 027 graph-metadata.json (8 children_ids listed, none promoted)

claim: description.json.parentChain[] carries a full ancestor chain (e.g. ['system-spec-kit', '028-code-graph-and-cocoindex'] for nested phase children) not present in graph-metadata.json parent_id alone; useful for multi-hop structural edges in legacy packets

derived.last_active_child_id is a recency pointer used only for /spec_kit:resume redirect; could emit a time-ordered SUPPORTS edge but requires a status guard (skip if child is complete) to avoid stale edges
derived.entities[*] with kind='doc' appear promotable but are LLM-derived (source='derived' in all observed files), so determinism confidence is low; defer until entity.source='manual' entries exist
description.json fields specId, keywords, memoryNameHistory carry no directional relationship semantics and should not be promoted to causal edges

existing manual-field promotion (depends_on/supersedes/related_to) lacks an idempotency guard on re-index — Phase 005 must verify that insertEdgesBatch uses upsert semantics (not blind INSERT) to satisfy the spec handoff criterion
cite: lib/storage/causal-edges.ts:859-898 (createSpecDocumentChain uses insertEdgesBatch; verify conflict strategy)
